title: Fast Progress
description: Fast Progress speeds up progression by multiplying block drops when mining.
body: Fast Progress is a lightweight progression/QoL mod that boosts resource gain by multiplying block drops when players break blocks. By default it targets only natural blocks (not player/entity-placed and outside generated structures), so it speeds up mining without encouraging structure griefing or easy duplication. Everything is configurable: multiplier, structure/placed block rules, Fortune/Silk Touch behavior, and a whitelist/blacklist block filter. Configure it via config/fastprogress.cfg, admin commands (/fastprogress), or the in-game config menu (optional client UI with server sync for OPs).
